nasb.text: Then David took the Philistine’s head and brought it to Jerusalem, but he put his weapons in his tent.

esv.text: And David took the head of the Philistine and brought it to Jerusalem, but he put his armor in his tent.

cnv.text: 大衛拿起那非利士人的頭，把它帶到耶路撒冷去，卻把那人的武器放在自己的帳棚裡。

ccb.text: 大卫把那非利士人的头颅带到耶路撒冷，把那人的兵器存放在自己的帐篷中。
